metadata.description: Mounchons's custom plugin marketplace for Thai enterprise development

plugins.name: system-design-doc
plugins.description: สร้างเอกสารออกแบบระบบมาตรฐาน 10 sections (22 commands) — split per-section layout (default) + registry design_doc_list.json schema 2.3.0, รองรับ Reverse Engineering, Import Plan, Brainstorming 8 phases, Mermaid diagrams 8 ประเภท, sitemap.json graph 8 node types + 8 commands /sitemap-* (R31-R35 validation), AC/UC source of truth (flat AC-NNN/UC-NNN) สำหรับ qa-ui-test traceability, sync กับ ui-mockup / long-running / qa-tracker, /validate-integration ครอบ 4 plugins พร้อม release-ready flag. v2.2.0: docs sync ครบ 22 commands + main entry split-aware + qa-trace registry contract fix + ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} paths

plugins.name: dotnet-dev
plugins.description: Expert .NET Core development skill สำหรับ ASP.NET Core MVC, Entity Framework Core, Clean Architecture, Repository/Unit of Work patterns และ .NET Aspire พร้อม Microsoft Learn MCP integration รองรับทั้ง PostgreSQL และ SQL Server. v1.3.0: .NET 10 LTS + EF Core 10 baseline, built-in OpenAPI แทน Swashbuckle, แก้ MCP tool names ให้ถูกต้อง (microsoft_docs_search/code_sample_search/docs_fetch + HTTP transport ตรง), แก้ template bugs (execution-strategy-safe transactions, property hiding, soft-delete filter ซ้ำ), Minimal APIs vs Controllers decision table, HybridCache + TimeProvider, restore trigger keywords EN+TH. v1.4.0: aspire-setup.md rewrite เป็น Aspire 13/.NET 10 (Aspire CLI, Enrich*DbContext แก้ double-register, WaitFor/ContainerLifetime/WithHttpHealthCheck — ทุก API verified vs MS Learn) + EF Core 10 patterns (named query filters, ComplexProperty+ToJson, ExecuteUpdateAsync regular lambda, SQL Server 2025 json type, Npgsql xmin). v1.5.0: 4 references ใหม่ (dependency-injection: TimeProvider/keyed services/HybridCache/IExceptionHandler, auth-security: JWT/MapIdentityApi/.NET 10 401-403, react-integration: CORS/Vite/AddViteApp/openapi-typescript/BFF, deployment: aspire publish/azd/migration bundles) + testing-patterns overhaul (xunit.v3/Testcontainers 4.x dual-DB/Respawn/FakeTimeProvider) + SKILL.md progressive-disclosure split (templates → clean-architecture-templates.md) — ทุก API verified vs MS Learn

plugins.name: long-running
plugins.description: Harness สำหรับ AI Agent ที่ทำงานข้าม context windows ได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ รองรับการทำงานต่อเนื่องหลาย sessions พร้อม feature tracking, progress logging, incremental development, v2.6 release gates (Gate 1 AC coverage, Gate 2 NFR compliance, Gate 3 bug verification) ผ่าน /nfr-check + /qa-coverage-check, **v2.8.0 Gate 4 UI Control Coverage** + /emit-control-spec command + .agent/ui-controls/feature-N.json manifest (Hybrid A+B with mockup cross-validation, drift severity policy, control-level unit-test enforcement at Step 5.5.1, --force-control-coverage / --skip-control-manifest overrides), /continue Step 5.4 auto-emit + 5.4.5 cross-validate + 5.6 enforce 4 gates ก่อน passes=true พร้อม --force-* overrides, design doc impact check ตอน add/edit feature, /scan-changes upstream traceability enforcer (v2.7.0 — detect orphan code changes/commits, reverse-map files to features via subtasks[].files[]; v2.7.1 — ignore patterns + .agent/scan-ignore + legacy commit cutoff via feature_list.created_at), /help command 11 modes พร้อม mode-based guide (รวม --controls + --gates) อ้างอิงจาก Anthropic Engineering Blog. v2.9.0 split-layout design-doc resolution (registry-aware). v2.10.0 docs sync ครบ 19 commands + wire split-layout เข้า /continue + แทน /test-runner,/ai-ui-test ด้วย /qa-ui-test + ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} paths

plugins.name: ui-mockup
plugins.description: สร้างและแก้ไข UI Mockup/Wireframe จาก System Design Document — bridge ระหว่าง system-design-doc และ frontend-design รองรับ ASCII wireframes, HTML mockups (Web Component master page), component specs, design tokens, CLAUDE.md-aware alert library, field mapping, framework-aware URL syntax, parallel sub-agents, qa-ui-test v2.5 integration: auto-derive complexity_factors + risk_baseline + acceptance_criteria_ids ใน /init-mockup Step 3.55 (factor inference heuristics ลด re-scan code) /help command พร้อม mode-based guide. v1.10.0: split-aware design-doc reading — canonical references/reading-design-docs.md + registry/sections[] resolution across create-html-mockup (Step 1b), create-mockups-parallel (resolve-then-inject), validate-mockup (Category 7 path-exists), edit-mockup (Step 3.5 non-blocking drift check). v1.11.0: docs sync (8 commands ครบใน README/help), create-html-mockup ลบ Agent(*) ที่ไม่มีจริง + ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} paths, mockup_list.json template QA fields + split-aware paths, SKILL.md References ลบ 2 ไฟล์ที่ไม่มีจริง

plugins.name: meta-labeling
plugins.description: Implement Meta-Labeling architecture for trading ML systems based on Marcos Lopez de Prado's methodology with two-layer signal filtering and position sizing

plugins.name: gold-trading-ml
plugins.description: Build and maintain Gold XAU/USD Day Trading ML system using Meta-Labeling architecture with multi-timeframe analysis, ensemble ML filtering, and ASP.NET Core dashboard

plugins.name: financial-backtesting
plugins.description: Rigorous financial backtesting methodology based on Marcos Lopez de Prado with purged k-fold, walk-forward validation, overfitting detection, and transaction cost modeling

plugins.name: qa-ui-test
plugins.description: QA UI Testing + Bug Management + NFR + Traceability + Manifest-driven — Playwright CLI test automation พร้อม **risk-based priority (P0-P3)** + 8 complexity factors + **3-tier model assignment** (opus/sonnet/haiku) with assigned_model_reason audit trail; bug lifecycle (triage → export → verify) ผูก scenario_risk_snapshot (frozen at fail-time) → factor-aware regression recommendations; **NFR Assessment** 4 categories (performance/security/reliability/maintainability) แต่ละ 0-100 + gate (PASS/CONCERNS/FAIL) — security < 75 = hard floor; **Traceability matrix** (AC ↔ scenarios) + GAP detection (release blocker); **Numeric review score 0-100** (4 dimensions × 25); auto-recompute risk on logic change with diff preview; **v2.6 --from-control-spec flag** ใน qa-create-scenario (Mode C) + qa-edit-scenario (Mode B) อ่าน .agent/ui-controls/feature-N.json จาก long-running v2.8.0+ → gen 5 mandatory categories per control (render-binding/api-binding/permission/validation/cascade-loading-error) + control_refs[]/control_test_category ใน scenario schema สำหรับ Gate 4 control coverage tracking; integration กับ long-running plugin (bidirectional: bug flow + manifest flow + Gate 4 loop); 13-mode /qa-help (รวม --troubleshoot decision tree + --control-spec manifest workflow); v2.6.1 qa-trace resolves AC/UC ผ่าน .design-docs/design_doc_list.json registry (split-aware) + flat AC-NNN + scenario.use_case_id

plugins.name: flow-discovery
plugins.description: วิเคราะห์ระบบ (brownfield + greenfield) ค้นหา workflow, scenario, edge case ที่ถูกมองข้าม — Multi-Agent Brainstorming (7 personas), Virtual User Simulation, Internet Research (problems, compliance, competitive), Adversarial Review จาก BMAD Method, auto-detect tech stack, export เอกสารสำหรับทีม

plugins.name: bigbrain
plugins.description: Graph RAG knowledge management — Temporal knowledge graph powered by Graphiti (Neo4j + Ollama), episode-based memory, auto entity/fact extraction, temporal versioning (auto-invalidation), async processing, multi-strategy search (nodes/facts/episodes), interactive graph traversal

plugins.name: brain
plugins.description: Graph Brain knowledge management — Brain First strategy: ค้น brain ก่อน codebase, auto-save findings ใหม่, deep scan ด้วย dependency tracing + permission matrix, รองรับ incremental scan และ cross-project knowledge. v3.1.0: เพิ่ม README + MCP prerequisites, แก้ GRAPH_PROTOCOL.md paths เป็น ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, document upsert-by-title semantics, trigger phrases EN+TH, argument-hint frontmatter

plugins.name: flow-monitor
plugins.description: Interactive dashboard for cross-plugin workflow visualization — two-way data sync with live refresh (SSE), Node.js API server, graph/tree/board/table views, edit from browser, Send to Claude task queue integration. Companion VSCode extension available at ./plugins/flow-monitor-vscode/

plugins.name: flow-monitor-vscode
plugins.description: VSCode Extension companion สำหรับ flow-monitor plugin — แสดง cross-plugin workflow visualizer (design ⇄ mockup ⇄ feature ⇄ qa) ใน VSCode sidebar พร้อม AI agent quick actions, auto-activate เมื่อพบ feature_list.json/design_doc_list.json/mockup_list.json/qa-tracker.json. ⚠ ติดตั้งผ่าน VSCode .vsix ไม่ใช่ Claude Code
